parameters.query:
=SELECT
    ci.sku,
    i.item_name,
    ci.quantity,
    i.unit,
    ci.price_at_addition AS unit_price,
    (ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition) AS line_total
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = {{ ($('Start').first().json.tool_input && $('Start').first().json.tool_input.chat_id) ? $('Start').first().json.tool_input.chat_id : $('Start').first().json.chat_id }}
AND c.status = 'active'
ORDER BY i.item_name ASC;

=SELECT
    ci.sku,
    i.item_name,
    ci.quantity,
    i.unit,
    ci.price_at_addition AS unit_price,
    (ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition) AS line_total
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = {{ ($('Start').first().json.tool_input && $('Start').first().json.tool_input.chat_id) ? $('Start').first().json.tool_input.chat_id : $('Start').first().json.chat_id }}
AND c.status = 'active'
ORDER BY i.item_name ASC;
